name: good-first-issue
description: Newcomer-friendly, pre-approved scope. Anyone may PR against it.

name: help-wanted
description: Open for external contribution, pre-approved scope.

name: scope:approved
description: Maintainer-approved scope. Applied to an issue or directly to a PR to bypass the scope gate.

name: needs-scope-approval
description: Auto-applied by pr-gate.yml to PRs that fail the scope gate.

name: invalid
description: Closed as not meeting contribution policy. Applied automatically by stale-close workflow.

name: spam
description: Obvious farming / LLM-slop PRs. Closed manually.
